{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231735342484B57DA4F029CAA1E2"}"},"total":466},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604099078293160728","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看，刚开始不习惯，毕竟抢夺不是主流感情观，可后面故事越来越好看，每个单元都节奏紧凑，有精彩的故事线，独特的逻辑，两人感情属于互相拉扯吸引，结局更是点睛，这不是一场掠夺，而是静心策划的暗恋，绝了 ，再次感叹番茄评分不准，这又是一本我心中至少9.5的好文"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770469516,"group_id":"7563540254116826136","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8DlX/V8Xcs3N2pyIQr4bWc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"87549720661885","user_name":"青木神鼎的犬山葵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"87549720661885","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7563540254116826136","book_info":{"abstract":"【男主视角+快穿+绿茶】
【横刀夺爱，1v1】

世界一：混球主角觊觎上了娇娇女～（完结）
世界二：伪装阳光男主想方设法勾搭阴湿女鬼姐姐～（完结）
世界三：大嫂，我不信你两眼空空～（完结）
世界四：狡诈男狐狸 vs 清冷大师姐～（完结）
世界五：不背叛就出不去的房间？（完结）

世界八：真少爷的腹黑女友 （完结）
